14 CLINICAL STUDIES The efficacy of RADICAVA ORS is based on a bioavailability study comparing RADICAVA and RADICAVA ORS [see Clinical Pharmacology (12.3) ] . The efficacy of RADICAVA for the treatment of ALS was established in a 6-month, randomized, placebo- controlled, double-blind study conducted

14.6 months in the placebo group.
